title: YTP: The Link & King Show in Gone Cruising Pt 2
description:
Episode 10: It's the final showdown between Link, King, Zelda and Toaster. Who will prevail???

The show is filmed in front of a live studio audience.

I would like to thank my fans for supporting the show in the long run!! I appreciate it!! :D
Like our Facebook page!! https://www.facebook.com/TheLinkKingShow
